arenasCreatedByUserId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Get all tournaments created by a given user.
Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).
arenasCreatedByUserId(String, Enums.TournamentState...) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Tournaments.arenasCreatedByUserId(String, Set)
arenasCreatedByUserId(String, Set<Enums.TournamentState>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Get tournaments created by a given user of specified status.
Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).

auth(Consumer<Builders.TokenBuilder>) - Static method in interface chariot.Client

bulks() - Method in interface chariot.api.ChallengesAuth
Get a list of upcoming bulk pairings you created.
Only bulk pairings that are scheduled in the future, or that have a clock start scheduled in the future, are listed.
Bulk pairings are deleted from the server after the pairings are done and the clocks have started.
bulks() - Method in record class chariot.model.BulkPairings
Returns the value of the bulks record component.

byGameId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Games.byGameId(String, Consumer)
byGameId(String, Consumer<Games.GameParams>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Download one game.
Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.
byGameIds(String...) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Games.byGameIds(Set, Consumer)
byGameIds(Set<String>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Games.byGameIds(Set, Consumer)
byGameIds(Set<String>, Consumer<Games.GameParams>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Download games by IDs.
Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
300 IDs can be submitted.
Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.

byUserId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Teams
 
byUserId(String, Consumer<Games.SearchFilter>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Download all games of any user
Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
The game stream is throttled, depending on who is making the request: Anonymous request: 20 games per second Authenticated: 30 games per second.

chariot - module chariot
Provides access to the Lichess API.
chariot - package chariot
Contains Client (and ClientAuth), which has static factory methods to get hold of an instance to communicate with the Lichess API.
chariot.api - package chariot.api
Contains the supported operations of the Lichess API.
chariot.model - package chariot.model
Contains the records which are used to model the data from the Lichess API.

createBulk(Consumer<ChallengesAuth.BulkBuilder>) - Method in interface chariot.api.ChallengesAuth
Schedule many games at once, up to 24h in advance.
OAuth tokens are required for all paired players, with the challenge:write scope.
You can schedule up to 500 games every 10 minutes.

crosstable(String, String, boolean) - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Get total number of games, and current score, of any two users.
If the `matchup` flag is provided, and the users are currently playing, also gets the current match game number and scores.

entryCode(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.TournamentsAuth.ArenaParams
Make the tournament private, and restrict access with a entry code.
You can either share this entry code directly with the users who should be able to join,
or you could use it to create user-specific entry codes which you can share - see TournamentsAuth.generateUserEntryCodes(String, Set).
entryCode(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.TournamentsAuth.SwissParams
Make the tournament restricted with a entry code.

_1600 indicates ratings between 1600-1800 and _2500 indicates ratings from 2500 and up.

gamesByArenaId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Download games of a arena tournament.
Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
gamesByArenaId(String, Consumer<Games.Filter>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Download games of a arena tournament.
Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
gamesBySwissId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Download games of a swiss tournament.
ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)
gamesBySwissId(String, Consumer<Games.Filter>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Download games of a swiss tournament.
ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)

generateUserEntryCode(String, String) - Method in interface chariot.api.TournamentsAuth
Generate a user entry code based on a tournament entry code.
This way you can share the user specific entry codes without needing to share the tournament entry code.
generateUserEntryCodes(String, Set<String>) - Method in interface chariot.api.TournamentsAuth
Generate user entry codes based on a tournament entry code, for a set of user ids.
This way you can share the user specific entry codes without needing to share the tournament entry code.

ifPresent(Consumer<T>) - Method in interface chariot.model.Result
If a value is present, performs the given action with the value, otherwise does nothing.
If the result contains many entries, the action is performed on each entry See Optional.ifPresent(Consumer)
ifPresentOrElse(Consumer<T>, Runnable) - Method in interface chariot.model.Result
If a value is present, performs the given action with the value, otherwise performs the given empty-based action.
If the result contains many entries, the action is performed on each entry See Optional.ifPresentOrElse(Consumer, Runnable)
imported() - Method in record class chariot.model.User.Count
Returns the value of the imported record component.
importGame(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Import a game from PGN.
Rate limiting: 200 games per hour for OAuth requests, 100 games per hour for anonymous requests.
See GamesAuth.importGame(java.lang.String) for authenticated access.
To broadcast ongoing games, consider pushing to a broadcast instead.
importGame(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.GamesAuth

liveStreamers() - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Read the status of current live streamers
This API is very fast and cheap on lichess side.
So you can call it quite often (like once every 5 seconds).

resultsByArenaId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
resultsByArenaId(String, int) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
resultsBySwissId(String) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
resultsBySwissId(String, int) - Method in interface chariot.api.Tournaments
Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.

reuseOrInitialize(Consumer<Builders.OAuthHelper>) - Static method in interface chariot.Client
Helper method for initializing and storing an authorized client configuration.
If the provided Preferences node already contains the token for the needed scopes, the authorized client will be returned immediately.
reuseOrInitialize(Preferences, Client.Scope...) - Static method in interface chariot.Client
See Client.reuseOrInitialize(Consumer)

statusByIds(boolean, String...) - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Users.statusByIds(Collection)
statusByIds(String...) - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Users.statusByIds(Collection)
statusByIds(Collection<String>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Read the `online`, `playing` and `streaming` flags of several users.
This API is very fast and cheap on lichess side, so you can call it quite often (like once every 5 seconds).
Use it to track players and know when they're connected on lichess and playing games.
Implementation Note, if the set of user ids is larger than 100 user ids,
the user ids will be split into groups of 100s and separate requests will be made for each group.
statusByIds(Collection<String>, boolean) - Method in interface chariot.api.Users
Users.statusByIds(Collection)

streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set<String>) - Method in interface chariot.api.Games
Stream the games played between a list of users, in real time.
Only games where both players are part of the list are included.
Maximum number of users: 300.

tournaments() - Method in interface chariot.Client
Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.
tournaments() - Method in interface chariot.ClientAuth
Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.
Tournaments - Interface in chariot.api
Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.
Official Arena tournaments are maintained by Lichess, but you can create your own Arena tournaments as well.
Tournaments(Integer, List<Activity.Tournament>) - Constructor for record class chariot.model.Activity.Type.Tournaments
Creates an instance of a Tournaments record class.
